---
title: "PM_TEMP_CORRECTION"
author: "Mirella Shaban"
date: "2026-03-19"
output: html_document
---
#In this script we are applying the NOAA regional temperature average to PM nodes whose temperatures show erroneous values (Node-03, node-06, node-08)

```{r}
#where the temperature is >12 or < -12, replace for -03,-06,-08 with the NOAA temperature (ambTmp)
full <- read.csv("~/Desktop/PM_VIS_TEMP/MERGED_PM_WIND_PRECIP.csv")


noaa_tmp_prcp <- read.csv("~/Desktop/PM_VIS_TEMP/noaa.csv")
bigdot <- read.csv("~/Desktop/PM_VIS_TEMP/BigDot_data_fullseason.csv")

bigdot$date <- ymd_hms(bigdot$date, truncated = 3)

bigdot$date <- as.POSIXct(bigdot$date, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
noaa_tmp_prcp$date <- as.POSIXct(noaa_tmp_prcp$date, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

anomalous_nodes <- c("node-03", "node-06", "node-08")

# Create mask
mask <- !is.na(bigdot$Temperature) & 
        !is.na(bigdot$site) &
        bigdot$site %in% anomalous_nodes & 
        (bigdot$Temperature < -12 | bigdot$Temperature > 12)

# Extract just the DATE portion from hourly datetime for matching
date_only <- as.Date(bigdot$date[mask])

# Match using date only
replacement_values <- noaa_tmp_prcp$tavg[match(date_only, as.Date(noaa_tmp_prcp$date))]

# Replace only where valid matches exist
rows_to_replace <- which(mask)
valid_replacements <- !is.na(replacement_values)

bigdot$Temperature[rows_to_replace[valid_replacements]] <- replacement_values[valid_replacements]
```
```{r}
#write.csv(bigdot, "~/Desktop/PM_VIS_TEMP/BigDot_NOAA_temp_correction.csv")


```
